scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch(e){}});const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Please use pnpm instead of npm/yarn');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
